description: Unchecked call return value vulnerabilities occur when a contract fails to validate the success or failure of low-level calls, such as `call`, `delegatecall`, and `staticcall`. Ignoring the return values of these calls can result in undetected errors, allowing malicious or unintended actions to succeed silently.
name: Unchecked Call Return Value
remediation: - **Check return values:** Always verify the success of low-level calls. - **Use higher-level abstractions:** Prefer method calls or, if you are confident that 2300 gas are sufficient for the recipient to handle the transfer, `transfer` over `call`, as they revert on failure.
